title: TestInventory probe output
description: Slice of repo-context produced by TestInventoryProbe (Layer A, Phase 1; S4-03). Strict (`additionalProperties: false`) at the slice root and at every nested object (`coverage_data`) per ADR-0004. The slice is OPTIONAL at the envelope (ADR-0010): non-Node repos may omit `test_inventory` entirely. `framework` is the closed UNIT-test framework enum (vitest|jest|mocha|tap|node_test); E2E frameworks (playwright, cypress) route to a separate `e2e_framework` field per CN-1 / arch line 756. `unit_test_count_is_file_count` is permanent in the contract: Phase 1 counts test FILES (not cases); Phase 2+ may add `unit_test_case_count` additively without changing this flag's semantics. `coverage_data` is ALWAYS emitted (CoverageBlock) when the probe ran; the `null` arm is the never-emitted-in-Phase-1 escape hatch reserved for the didn't-run case. Warning IDs match the ADR-0007 pattern.

framework.description: Detected unit-test framework. Closed enum; E2E frameworks (playwright/cypress) route to `e2e_framework` instead. `node_test` is reported only when `engines.node >= 18` AND no other framework is declared.

e2e_framework.description: Detected E2E framework. Independent axis from `framework` (a repo with jest + playwright populates BOTH).

unit_test_file_count.description: Count of `*.test.{js,ts,jsx,tsx,mjs,cjs}` and `*.spec.{js,ts,jsx,tsx,mjs,cjs}` files under the repo root, excluding the Phase-0 noise-dir set (`node_modules`, `dist`, `build`, `.next`, `.git`, `__pycache__`, `coverage`, etc.).

unit_test_count_is_file_count.description: Always true in Phase 1; signals that `unit_test_file_count` is a *file* count, not a *case* count. Phase 2+ may add `unit_test_case_count: int | null` additively.

commands.description: Verbatim canonical test scripts from `package.json#scripts`. Closed key set: only the six canonical names are accepted; non-canonical scripts are dropped at probe time. Keys are alpha-sorted in the emitted slice. Values are recorded verbatim and never evaluated (production ADR-0005).

smoke_test_path.description: POSIX repo-relative path to the first detected smoke entrypoint in precedence order: scripts/smoke.sh > scripts/smoke.js > scripts/smoke.ts > tests/smoke/.

present.description: True iff `coverage/lcov.info` exists at probe time.

parse_error.description: True iff parsing `coverage/lcov.info` raised (size cap, symlink refusal, OSError, etc.). Use the `coverage.lcov_parse_error` / `coverage.size_cap_exceeded` warning IDs to discriminate.

totals.description: Summed lcov totals across every record in `coverage/lcov.info`. Null when `parse_error` is true OR when the file is absent.

coverage_data.description: Always a CoverageBlock when the probe ran (Phase 1). The `null` arm is reserved for the unreachable-in-Phase-1 didn't-run case (CN-2 escape hatch).

warnings.description: Soft-degrade signals. Each item matches the ADR-0007 ID pattern.
